svg.text: Which scanner caught the hidden malware?
One benign-canary model · 4 evasion variants · 4 pickle scanners · 100% local Docker, no egress
Independent security research · benign canary payload · isolated, no-egress lab · not a weaponized exploit.
Controlled, reproducible test of the versions above — reflects detection behavior against a synthetic evasion class, not a verdict on any product's overall security.
Product names are trademarks of their respective owners · no affiliation or endorsement · author's opinion, provided as-is · 0 false positives on clean set.
